profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Indo American Seafoods Tbk produces, processes, and sells shrimps in Indonesia, Japan, India, and the United Sates. The company offers shrimp shells and heads. PT Indo American Seafoods Tbk was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Bandar Lampung, Indonesia. PT Indo American Seafoods Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Indo American Foods.
